text.title: Cold Outreach Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Cold Outreach end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: build-prospect-list
step.action: Build list ≤200 with name + role + personalisation signal.

step.name: draft-sequence
step.action: Draft 4-5 steps, body ≤5 sentences each, spaced 2-3 days.

step.name: set-stop-conditions
step.action: Configure stop on reply + bounce; throttle to warmup cap.

step.name: review-after-cycle
step.action: Measure reply / positive / paid; feed objections to objection-bank.
